steps.title: Find the shared claim
steps.content: Text 1 says many current artists make albums much longer than albums from decades past because physical limits matter less. Text 2 similarly says many new albums are longer and have more songs than albums made for physical formats.

steps.title: Exclude unsupported comparisons
steps.content: Choice A mentions artwork, Choice B mentions sales, and Choice D mentions volume; none of those topics appears in both texts. The shared point is that many new albums are longer than albums generally used to be. The answer is C.
